query: Escalation trong sự cố P1 diễn ra như thế nào?

expected_answer: Ticket P1 tự động escalate lên Senior Engineer nếu không có phản hồi trong 10 phút sau khi tạo ticket.
faithfulness_notes: LLM-as-Judge (gpt-4o): Answer is fully supported by context [1].
relevance_notes: LLM-as-Judge (gpt-4o): Answer discusses escalation process but lacks specific details on P1 incident escalation.
completeness_notes: LLM-as-Judge (gpt-4o): Misses most core content about escalation process. | missing: ['Automatic escalation to Senior Engineer if no response in 10 minutes.']
